summary: Frontend-only regression test completed for KNSelect component migration in Purchase Requisition module. All KNSelect dropdowns (searchable combobox and Radix Select variants) work correctly without crashes. The refactoring from native <select> to KNSelect component and DetailPanel extraction is successful.
passed_tests: PR list page renders with 9 PRs (no white screen, no crash)
Create PR form: pr-product-select (searchable combobox) opens, searches, and selects correctly
Create PR form: pr-warehouse (Radix Select) opens and selects correctly
Create PR form: pr-supplier (Radix Select) opens and selects correctly
PR creation flow completes successfully (PR-00010 created)
PR detail panel renders correctly with items and action buttons
PR conversion modal opens with pr-convert-supplier KNSelect working
PR conversion modal pr-convert-warehouse KNSelect working
Reorder Suggestions: reorder-warehouse KNSelect opens and selects correctly
Reorder PR creation from selected rows works (PR-00011 created)
No React crashes, no white screen, no console errors
Empty-string value handling works correctly (no crash from previous issue)

success_percentage.backend: N/A (backend unchanged, already verified 24/24 PASS in iteration_15)
